No daily loss limit; -7%/stage max loss (-10% at Pro M), breach = quarantine not fail. Allocation model: no profit target or challenge-style first-payout window ('N/A'). [verify 2026-05-27] Stage/split/max-loss table fully confirmed on axi.com/int/axi-select (6 stages, splits 0/40/50/60/70/80, -7% max loss / -10% Pro M, no daily limit, base split 80% not 90%). Trading uses a virtual allocation that is not withdrawable; off-platform trading is not permitted. Challenge accounts are capped at $400k combined starting balance; Instant Funding is capped at $100k combined. Payout table set to 0d/0h per instant on-chain payout docs; FAQ also contains a 1-6h processing line, so verify live checkout/dashboard. Platform-level round-trip fees: crypto 0.040%, stocks/ETFs 0.020%, commodities 0.012%, indices 0.014%, forex 0.010%; GMX funding and Ostium rollover costs may vary. Add-ons shown: 80%/90% profit split and remove 1% risk-per-trade limit, each +20%. Pricing source: https://docs.dojifunded.com/account-pricing
